prompt: From the given cell image, reconstruct the entire tissue.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic microscopic image depicting a biological tissue. This tissue should be composed of multiple instances of the single, elongated, ciliated cell shown in image 1, replicated and tightly integrated to form a cohesive, larger structure. Each cell should maintain the translucent appearance and internal greenish-yellow granular structures observed in image 1. The overall image should preserve the brightfield microscopic aesthetic and the neutral background.
objects: cells resembling the one in image 1
